title: Ashen + Trinkets Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the Trinkets mod.
body:
This addon provides modified slot and inventory textures from vanilla Minecraft to make them compatible with the Trinkets mod while keeping the Ashen resourcepack style.

Choose the version that best fits your needs – with 1, 2, or 3 Trinket slots (examples are available in the gallery).

This addon **does not** add custom icons or specific slots; it only provides borders for an n-number of slots due to the limitations of the mod.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (**sof_izh**) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do **not** report these issues to **Aim_Boot**, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- Emi – [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod
